blockingIssues.description: The fix corrected the agent-definition path in skills/define-worker-skills/SKILL.md, but it still documents `discoveredIssues` severity `suggestion` instead of restricting the schema to this mission's `blocking` and `non_blocking` convention.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make skill-feedback guidance consistent: workers should not mark `followedProcedure: true` when they record a concrete deviation from required validation or skill-invocation steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original define-worker-skills implementation and its follow-up fix both recorded deviations in `skillFeedback.deviations` while still marking `followedProcedure: true` in their handoffs.

rejectedObservations.observation: The original path mismatch between agents/*.md and .mission/skills/*/SKILL.md
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for this round because the rerun confirmed the fix commit corrected the worker-definition path; only the remaining severity-schema issue is still actionable.

previousRound: .factory/validation/planning/scrutiny/synthesis.json (round 1 overwritten by round 2 synthesis; prior round status was fail for define-worker-skills-skill)
